evidence_summary: Establish the Wizard's use of psychological placebo by providing a green liquid to the Cowardly Lion. The scene must visually track the transition from physical trembling and slumped posture to an upright, bravado-filled stance following the ingestion of th...

The Cowardly Lion seeks courage. Oz provides a green liquid in a dish, claiming it must be swallowed to work. The Lion drinks it and immediately feels transformed by the perceived power of the potion.
cowardly_lion is slumped and trembling with anxiety.
cowardly_lion stands upright with sudden bravado.
The Lion drinks the green liquid and undergoes a psychological transformation.
